chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.20 of 2024 Ghulam Murtaza & another Versus Touseef Ahmed & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 791/24 2. For orders on CMA 340/24 3. For orders on CMA 341/24 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 25.04.2024 None present. -.-.- On the last date counsel for appellants sought time to assist the Court as to the maintainability of this appeal yet today he has remained absent. There is no intimation either. Appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
